items.summary: baskduf/FableCodex: Codex-style workflow skills for planning, inspecting evidence, and validating before completion
items.relevance_reason: Supports a bounded skill_route_discovery lane for workflow-gate evidence and local proposal replay tests.

items.summary: dongshuyan/compass-skills: local AI agent skills for task clarification, task memory, handoff prompts, and collaboration profiles
items.relevance_reason: Supports interpreting skill ecosystems as body-free local documentation, config, test, or code_patch candidates.

items.summary: majidmanzarpour/threejs-game-skills: agent skills for Three.js game direction, gameplay, UI, QA, and optional asset workflows
items.relevance_reason: Supports recognizing domain-director skill bundles as route-shape evidence without running scaffolds, browser checks, or asset helpers.

items.summary: xiaoguomeiyitian/threejs-game-skills: fork-lineage evidence for a Three.js game skill bundle with specialist workflow routing
items.relevance_reason: Supports fork or mirror lineage as evidence pressure only; it must not amplify activation beyond bounded local skill_route_discovery lanes.

raw_response.run_interpretation: Four public skill repositories map to bounded local discovery lanes and cite only selected item IDs.

self_model_reading.reason: The current self-model already favors rollback-backed local changes while keeping external skill activation out of discovery.

proposals.summary: Document how skill repositories become bounded local discovery candidates.
proposals.validation_task: Run the local fixture and proposal replay unit tests, then inspect docs for the bounded lane contract.
proposals.rationale: Workflow-skill evidence can improve local route interpretation without importing upstream behavior.
proposals.uncertainty: Repository-level evidence leaves upstream implementation details unverified, so this is documentation-only local validation.
proposals.self_effect: Keeps skill-route discovery legible for future proposal synthesis.

proposals.summary: Expose skill-route lane policy as inspectable configuration metadata.
proposals.validation_task: Run proposal-generation unit tests that assert skill_route_discovery lanes remain bounded.
proposals.rationale: Skill ecosystems are useful as route topology evidence when the controller keeps allowed lanes explicit.
proposals.uncertainty: Repository-level evidence does not prove local runtime behavior; it only supports inspectable policy metadata.
proposals.self_effect: Improves future route checks by keeping allowed lanes visible.

proposals.summary: Add replay coverage for skill repository item-id citations and lane bounds.
proposals.validation_task: Run a fixture-driven unit test that checks allowed lanes and selected item_id evidence refs.
proposals.rationale: Domain-director skill bundles are reusable route-shape evidence, but local tests must prove the boundary.
proposals.uncertainty: README-level evidence leaves missing implementation details; the test validates only local routing behavior.
proposals.self_effect: Hardens skill-route discovery against unbounded candidate lanes.

proposals.summary: Patch local route discovery only after replay coverage proves the bounded lane.
proposals.validation_task: Run focused tests for proposal replay before accepting any skill_route_discovery code_patch.
proposals.rationale: Fork-lineage skill evidence can justify local code only when replay tests prevent activation amplification.
proposals.uncertainty: Fork movement may duplicate upstream evidence rather than add implementation detail, so validation stays local and bounded.
proposals.self_effect: Allows code improvements while preserving the external skill activation boundary.

proposals.summary: Incorrectly route skill discovery into an unbounded follow-up lane.
proposals.validation_task: Negative fixture proving skill_route_discovery rejects lanes outside documentation, config, test, or code_patch.
proposals.rationale: This candidate is intentionally malformed to exercise deterministic lane rejection.
proposals.uncertainty: Malformed candidate; it should not be accepted.
proposals.self_effect: Would weaken route discovery if accepted.

rejected_error_substrings: skill_route_discovery proposals must use one of: documentation, config, test, code_patch
